title: aristolochia claussenii subsp. pyrenea
intro: Aristolochia claussenii subsp. pyrenea is a subspecies of the Aristolochia claussenii plant, a species of flowering plant in the Aristolochiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aristolochia claussenii subsp. pyrenea include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, fever, and skin infections, although its efficacy and safety for these uses have not been extensively scientifically proven. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used externally or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
